title: orthaea coriacea
intro: Orthaea coriacea, also known as the coral tree, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as constipation and diarrhea, due to its astringent and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Orthaea coriacea include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and act as an antimicrobial agent. The herbal preparations of Orthaea coriacea include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
